items.title: Asian shares steady in holiday-thinned trade; weak Japan GDP cools rally
items.description: Japan on Monday reported its economy grew a miserly 0.1 per cent annualised in the December quarter, far below the 1.6 per cent gain forecast as government spending dragged on activity

items.title: Eyeing passive income? Keep an eye on these 8 dividend paying stocks today
items.description: Among the listed companies, Majestic Auto has announced the highest dividend, declaring a special dividend of ₹35 per share, with February 17 as the record date

items.title: Stock Market LIVE Updates: Sensex down 100 pts, Nifty below 25,450; BSE drops 9%, Angel One 7%
items.description: Sensex Today | Stock Market LIVE Updates, Monday, Feb 16: In the broader markets, the Nifty MidCap index slipped 0.56 per cent, and the Nifty SmallCap index dropped 1 per cent

items.title: AI threat to Indian IT stocks? Motilal Oswal explains road head for sector
items.description: According to MOFSL, enterprise complexity, legacy systems and governance constraints could slow AI adoption, pushing productivity gains further out

items.title: Stocks to buy: Choice Equity analyst suggests Minda Corp, Bajaj Consumer
items.description: Minda Corp stock is near ₹610-breakout with higher lows, while Bajaj Consumer stock is seeing long-term reversal above ₹345. Aakash Shah suggests buy levels, stop loss and share price targets

items.title: Stocks to Watch today, Feb 16: Ola Electric, Kfin Tech, Inox Green, HUL
items.description: Stocks to Watch today, Feb 16: From Ola Electric to Inox Green Energy, here are few stocks that will be on investors' radar

items.title: ICICI Bank, Max Health shares flash 'Buy' signals; check levels, targets
items.description: ICICI Bank & Max Health shares show bullish technical setups with breakout patterns and EMA crossovers, says Osho Krishan of Angel One. Check buy levels, stop loss, price targets for near-term upside

items.title: Groww fall 5% as JM Financial projects 13% downside; initiates with 'Sell'
items.description: Groww share price fell as much as 4.87 per cent to ₹164.5 per share on the National Stock Exchange (NSE)

items.title: Torrent Pharma shares advance 6% as Q3 results meet D-St estimates
items.description: Torrent Pharma reported a 26.2 per cent jump in its net profit to ₹635 crore in Q3FY26. On a sequential basis, profit increased 7.4 per cent from ₹591 crore

items.title: Lupin rises post-Q3 analysts call, but brokerages flag FY27 earnings risk
items.description: In the December quarter, the company reported a 37 per cent growth in consolidated net profit at ₹1,175.5 crore, as compared to ₹855.16 crore a year ago

items.title: Kwality Wall's shares list at 26% discount on NSE post demerger from HUL
items.description: On the National Stock Exchange (NSE), the stock listed at ₹29.8 per share, marking a discount of ₹10.4 or 25.8 per cent

items.title: Natco Pharma zooms 11% on getting CDSCO approval for Semaglutide injections
items.description: The buying on the counter came after Natco Pharma received approval from the Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation (CDSCO) for Semaglutide in India

items.title: Why did BSE, Angel One, MCX shares fall up to 10% after RBI funding norms?
items.description: BSE, Angel One and MCX shares fell up to 10% after RBI revised capital market exposure norms. JM Financial says new rules favour banks but tighten funding for brokers

items.title: RACL Geartech soars 14%, hits 52-wk high; what's driving auto parts stock?
items.description: ICICI Securities is positive on RACL driven by its strategic presence in premium auto component space with strong order book visibility targeting ₹1,000 crore sales over next 4-5 years.

items.title: Inox Wind shares drop 7% as analysts cut estimates after Q3 results
items.description: JM Financial has downgraded Inox Wind Ltd to 'Add' from 'Buy', while trimming its FY28 earnings per share (EPS) estimates

items.title: Aye Finance IPO: Shares list flat at ₹129 amid subdued investor response
items.description: Aye Finance share price: The NBFC's stocks opened their maiden trading session on the BSE and NSE at ₹129 per share, matching the issue price

items.title: Fractal Analytics IPO disappoints on debut; shares list at 3% discount
items.description: On the NSE, Fractal Analytics shares opened lower at ₹876 per share, down ₹24 or 2.67 per cent from the IPO price

items.title: Ola Electric slides 7% as analysts flag prolonged turnaround after weak Q3
items.description: Ola Electric reported a consolidated net loss of ₹487 crore in Q3, down from ₹564 crore in the same quarter last year

items.title: Dr Reddy's: 5 technical reasons why Choice Broking is bullish on this stock
items.description: Analysts at Choice Broking expects Dr Reddy's Laboratories stock to gain up to 15.5%, and test ₹1,465 levels on the upside in the medium-term given the favourable structure on the weekly chart.
